title: rhodiola chrysanthemifolia subsp. chrysanthemifolia
intro: Rhodiola chrysanthemifolia subsp. chrysanthemifolia, also known as golden root, is a subspecies of the Rhodiola genus, a group of flowering plants in the family Crassulaceae. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Asia, and it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, adaptogenic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhodiola chrysanthemifolia subsp. chrysanthemifolia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mental performance and memory, and enhancing physical endurance. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
